channel.title: Admins on Bratia Music
channel.description: Recent content in Admins on Bratia Music

item.title: insights
item.description: system: bratia-music analytics console status: active mode: read-only interpretation layer attraction_layer album_view concert_view video_view notes: what attracts attention without commitment intention_layer spotify_click youtube_click member_click notes: what generates external navigation conversion_layer ticket_click booking_submit email_click notes: what produces real-world action interpretation_rules high attraction + low intention = decorative content low attraction + high intention = hidden value high intention + low conversion = trust or timing issue warnings do not confuse visits with interest do not optimize for vanity metrics prioritize conversion signals
